reviews.review_title: Works very well as a relaxation app
reviews.review_description: Purchased and used to relax for myself, found it fantastic to help others relax in stressful situations
I paid for this and it does not want to down load do not buy this

developer_response.body: Hi anubia, The installation of the app has been tested by ourselves and Oculus on multiple phones without issue. Whilst the app is 700mb, you will need approximately double the space to complete the installation. For example we tried it with 950mb free and it failed. With 1400mb free the install was successful. Please first check you have enough storage available and try the installation again. If you are still having issues, please log a support call with Oculus who will help troubleshoot the issue on your phone.

reviews.review_description: Beautiful locations although in 3 of them, some surroundings seemed to look rather odd to me, a bit unrealistic which spoilt it a bit. Same thing with the seagulls but i just removed them. The app kept throwing me out to oculus home at times when i entered a location and browsed options which was a nuisance so i hope this isn't going to keep happening. Overall this app is good, just needs slight improvement.

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for the feedback and glad your enjoying the app. If the app is exiting, please try and reboot your phone to clear up memory.

reviews.review_description:
Booted up the app from the oculus app prior to putting headset on and it's still a black screen for all locations.

Update: it worked after trying your suggestions. Just needed a reboot after reinstalling. Thank you!

developer_response.body: Hi, Sorry to hear your having a problem. The app has been tested on multiple types of devices by ourselves and Oculus. Could you please try uninstalling, rebooting your phone and reinstalling. If you are still having problems, please email us at service@exvrience.com. Thanks

reviews.review_description:
Update I followed the instructions from the development and that way it works. 


It doesn't work on my phone, I only see the effects and hear sound but no surrounding. 

On the galaxy s6 

I expect this to be great, I really would like to see it.

developer_response.body: Update: Glad to see that worked. Appreciate the review and that you are enjoying the app. Hi, For Note 5 and S6 users, please launch the app directly from the Oculus App on your phone under "Library" prior to putting the GearVR headset on.

reviews.review_description: See all menus & hear music but when I select a location get a black screen

developer_response.body: Hi, Please launch the app directly from the Oculus App on your phone under "Library" prior to putting the GearVR headset on.

reviews.review_description: At first i enjoyed this with all the options it was fun eventhough it was like looking at a blurry 2d photo. The new update isnt much better. A little more realistic and the view isn't above the scene any longer but now i feel like im trapped in a sufficating bubble. Can't do it.  Sorry.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback. We are continuing to enhance the experience in each update based on customer feedback and suggestions.

reviews.review_description: I'm having problems installing the app. Can anyone help?

developer_response.body:
Hi animalceo, 
The app has been tested by ourselves and Oculus on multiple phones without issue. Whilst the app is 650mb, you will need approximately double the space to complete the installation. For example we tried it with 950mb free and it failed. With 1400mb free the install was successful. Please first check you have enough storage available and try the installation again. If you are still having issues, please email us at service@exvrience.com with some further details we would be happy to help troubleshoot your issue.

reviews.review_description: Like the way you can combine effects, music and scenery. Very relaxing.

developer_response.body:
Hi jame01,
Thanks for the the comment and so glad you are enjoying the app.

reviews.review_description: Low details
Great special effects like the fireworks, butterflies, etc. Very soothing music and scenery. A 5++ rating. Feels like you're there listening to the waves.

Hi jrluvsvr,
Thanks for the the comment and so glad you are enjoying the app.

Payed for it .it worked but has now stopped working

reviews.review_title: Fails to run on S10, paid app...
reviews.review_description: This app used to run on my S7, but fails now, on my newer S10.  I'm not sure it it's a revision issue in the software or incompatibility with newer hardware...  but I paid for this, used it, liked it, and am upset it's gone.

The app seamlessly blends 360 video with a simple game engine. 

There are certainly more features to add, but this is the gold standard of relaxation apps. This app has potential as a true supplement to therapy.

developer_response.body:
Hi tobislu,
Thanks for the the feedback and glad you are enjoying the app.

reviews.review_description: It’s nice to turn off the drama and just relax. These are movies of real places that Loop. The options that you can add, like butterflies and snow are animated. I didn't mind buying this at all it's exactly what I was looking for. I wish the movies were a little longer but the loops are almost seamless. Definitely will purchase more of these when they are released.

developer_response.body:
Hi Bottlecap,
Thanks for the the feedback and so glad you are enjoying the app.

reviews.review_description:
Great app. Love that it is based on video as that gives a realistic look and the locations are phenomenal. Music also seems pretty good and being able to use your own is excellent.

It is definitely not perfect though. The seagull audio ruins that effect and I don't really like most of the others. 3D audio in general seems a bit off as it transitions from one ear to othet rather suddenly. The video isn't super sharp everywhere and you can see seams if looking down as well as notice the point where it loops for some. The menus could use touch pad support and the worst issue of them all for me is that it does not seem to run entirely smoothly on a S6 as the waves on the beach slow down and stutter some times.

Overall I'd still definitely recommend it. The developers seem to keep improving it and it provides the kind of relaxation experience I have been looking for.

developer_response.body:
Hi varsee,

Thanks for the great feedback. Each of the effects can be switched on and off which is part of the design of the app to tailor the relaxation. The app has been thoroughly tested on an s6 by Oculus and ourselves with no issues with performance - please try restarting your phone to resolve the issue. Touch pad is a great suggestion and we are continuing to enhance the experience based on customer feedback and suggestions.

reviews.review_description: Found this very relaxing. The locations, music and effects are great - especially the butterflies. Liked the ability to choose from different options.
I have not been able to enjoy this app sadly because the sound plays but video refuses to work.  I have a note 5. Please fix it!
Location video does not work. Uninstall reinstall several times location video still does not work I want my money back

developer_response.body: Hi, For Note 5 and S6 users, please launch the app directly from the Oculus App on your phone under "Library" prior to putting the GearVR headset on.

reviews.review_description: Nice relaxing in build music but can't seem to get any visuals screen remains blank and I have uninstalled it three times and reinstalled needs fixing.
